case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MERLIS JULISSA CRUZ BONILLA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MERLIS JULISSA CRUZ BONILLA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $579.82 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, MERLIS JULISSA CRUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
